name: recoil_app_scalar_deleting_destructor
description: RecoilApp::ScalarDeletingDestructor runs the app destructor, conditionally frees this when bit 0 of flags is set, and returns this.
known_limits: Binary-safe verification is accepted by the recoil_app_scalar_deleting_destructor VC target.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly and decompilation for 0x42e0b0 validate the app destructor call, flags bit-0 delete branch, returned self pointer, and thiscall callee cleanup for the flags argument.
The native smoke verifies the non-deleting RecoilApp path returns this and leaves owned state vtables in the base-state teardown form.
The native smoke verifies the deleting RecoilApp heap path returns the original this pointer.
